name: Crucified Rush | DOORS
description:
You struck a deal with Guiding Light, they loosen up on the strength of the crucifix powers so you could hold an entity in place. They didn't have to see what you were doing. So here you were with your first victim, chained up and under your command…

Character is from hit Roblox horror experience "DOORS 👁"

Art by: @Digitalphobia

(Ambush alternative: Crucified Ambush | DOORS)

Submissive Rush basically

Crucifix works as it does in game, Idk if the bot will really be able to perfectly line up with the game mechanics, so you might have to explain in your responses/fix responses that make something incorrect

12/27/24— This an older bot, so it isn't as written out as my more recent ones. It's possible I may add some info later on and do some refining.
creator: SleepyBearCubxX
